title: Deprecate day-trading-mnq-mgc from core catalog and mark as optional pack
summary: Apply conservative deprecation posture to day-trading-mnq-mgc by marking it optional and documenting non-removal pending telemetry review.
details:
Implement a non-destructive deprecation update.

Scope:
1. Update `skills/day-trading-mnq-mgc/SKILL.md` with deprecation notice indicating optional-pack status.
2. Keep skill intact (no hard deletion).
3. Add clear note that final removal requires usage telemetry review over one full quarterly cycle.
4. Ensure discoverability remains possible for users who still need it.

Acceptance:
- Skill is marked optional/deprecated with explicit review gate.
- No hard removal or broken references.

affectedFiles.description: Add conservative deprecation/optional-pack status note and review gate.

diffPreview: ~ Add deprecation banner and optional-pack positioning; preserve full skill content for compatibility.
estimatedImpact: Reduces core-catalog clutter while avoiding accidental loss of potentially important niche workflows.
executorPrompt: Edit `skills/day-trading-mnq-mgc/SKILL.md` to add a clear deprecation/optional-pack status notice and a telemetry-based review gate for any future hard removal. Do not delete core content. Return the exact deprecation text added.
